PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetUnlessStatementImpl(UNLESS_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(UNLESS)('unless')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
        PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(+)('+')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(==)('==')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''false'')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(ELSE)('else')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''true'')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
